rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF LOUISA THEADORA MARIA VAN VELZEN
rulings.Calendar Matter: REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. No DE-120 form is on file to show timely notice of the amendment given with a copy of the remote appearance information required by LRSF 14.1(C)(6). Moreover, the amendment did not address the following issues (e-mailed to counsel on 04/16/2024): 1) Each status report must allege the information required by LRSF 14.35(J)(1) including allegations regarding notice pursuant to Probate Code section 9202, disclosure of all creditor claims and their dispositions, requests for special notice, and any assignments or powers of attorney that may affect distribution, even if the same information was alleged in the previous report. 2) Did the petitioner take any IAEA actions reportable under CRC 7.250(a) during this second status report period? 3) The decedent died more than two years ago, but no first interim accounting covering a two-year period from the date of death has been filed. Does the petitioner anticipate obtaining waivers of account from all the beneficiaries or applying for the Court's approval to exceed the account period under LRSF 14.34(A)? 4) Please provide a proof that the estate cash on hand is fully insured in observance of the FDIC limit or is otherwise held in the form of authorized investment(s). 5) Louis Gerald Hendrikus van Velzen's address listed on the proof of service is different from his address reported in April-May 2023. Has he moved? 6) Re Marie Nieuweboer: i) Please provide her date of death. ii) Please provide a copy of letters issued to Aad Meijer (or any other person) as personal representative of her estate. iii) If there is no court-appointed personal representative of her estate, please identify (names and address) all successors in interest who intend to sign small estate affidavits. The Court is to determine whether to take this status petition off calendar and order a first interim account covering a 2-year period from the date of death. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF DAVID PACHECO JR
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The following issues must be clarified and/or cleared: 1. The current balance as of 6/30/24 does not appear sufficient to cover all of the requested fees, proposed distribution and reserve. Appears $(38,610.82.) 2. The supplements do not specify the name of the court appointed guardians for each minor heir. Case number, case name and the name of the guardians must be stated. 3. Proposed order must be submitted to reflect all supplemented and clarified information. The caption of the order must begin with Order for Final Distribution. See LRSF 14.35.I.6).b. 4. The court to determine whether or not the disbursement of $1,000 to the accounting preparer to be deducted from the statutory compensation pursuant to LRSF 14.51. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.
